implementation_summary.summary: CP00-856 extends the RP28 Marketplace descriptor-only UI permission/audit binding slice across RP28.P04.M03.S21-RP28.P04.M05.S16 without rendering UI runtime, executing API runtime, tenant installs, connector loading, custom AI app execution, permission decisions, audit writes, product-state writes, or real client data handling.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-856 RP28.P04.M03.S21-RP28.P04.M05.S16 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

review_adjudication.p3_disposition: CP856-P3-001: Non-blocking informational note. Latent robustness gap not present in CP00-856 data; does not affect descriptor-only verification, the no-write/no-leak boundaries, or any closeout gate. CP00-856 full validation suite is recorded after queue regeneration and before commit; row-key duplicate risk is not present in the CP856 section titles and is deferred as a non-blocking robustness follow-up.
